scripts.dev: sh -c "DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:generate:sqlite && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:push:sqlite && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:seed && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db DEBUG=true next dev"
scripts.vercel-build: sh -c "DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:generate:sqlite && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:push:sqlite && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:seed && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db DEBUG=true next build"
scripts.build:local: sh -c "DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:generate:sqlite && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:push:sqlite && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:seed && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db DEBUG=true next build"
scripts.db:migrate:prod: npm run env:check && npm run prisma:migrate
scripts.test:db:local: sh -c "DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:generate:sqlite && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:push:sqlite && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npm run prisma:seed"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:crud && npm run test:auth
